core_mechanism: an exact duality (canonical exchange of a conjugate variable pair) that maps a driven nonlinear oscillator's equation of motion onto a formally identical equation for its conjugate variable, so a periodic external drive produces the same mode-locking/synchronization plateaus in the dual observable
brief_reason: The abstract establishes that the quasi-charge dynamics is exactly dual to the standard phase dynamics via conjugate variables (with an inductance term essential to make the duality exact), predicting the dual analogue of drive-induced locking steps.
